description: Implement automated semantic versioning, changelog generation, and CI/CD publishing pipelines that push dynamically versioned incremental updates to Hugging Face datasets/spaces, Zenodo DOIs, and OSF archives on every master merge and version tag.
oracle_notes: Existing tracks 8 (HF upload), 9 (Zenodo), 24 (mirroring), and 36 (HF Space) are complete or planned but none have CI/CD auto-publishing workflows. Publishing is entirely manual via CLI. No semantic versioning, no changelog, no PyPI publishing. Track 24's OSF integration is designed but unimplemented. This track closes the CI/CD automation gap for all three targets.
